g.text: "represents: user has active account with positive balance"
"represents: system tracks cumulative daily withdrawal total"
"represents: user receives decline message indicating amount exceeds balance or daily limit"
"invariant: inv_authenticated_channel_required: some c: channel | c.authenticated = True"
"invariant: nfr_fact_usability_distinct_channel_kinds: all disj c1, c2: channel | c1.kind != c2.kind"
